title: biscutella laevigata subsp. vulgaris
intro: Biscutella laevigata subsp. vulgaris, also known as the Smooth Biscutella, is a plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae, commonly found in the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also rich in antioxidants, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and protecting against oxidative stress. The herbal preparations of Biscutella laevigata subsp. vulgaris include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to make teas and tinctures for medicinal purposes.
